title: Route a small fictional dependency update
request: Update the fictional acme-sample-parser package after reviewing compatibility and security impact, then validate the smallest affected surface.

requiredInputs: current and proposed fictional package versions
focused validation command or skipped-check reason
outputSignals: reviews dependency and security impact before implementation
checks compatibility and lockfile scope before recommending edits
names focused validation and explicit skipped or not-run evidence
failureSignals: starts implementation before dependency and security review
claims a vulnerability or network lookup without evidence
claims validation passed when it was skipped or not run

boundaries: does not call Claude Code, Codex, network tools, package registries, or marketplace install paths
does not include private consumer names, endpoints, credentials, local paths, or repository addresses
